prompt: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the flat-colored character into a {argument name="art style" default="fully rendered, high-quality anime illustration"}. Apply detailed {argument name="lighting effect" default="shading, glossy highlights, and depth"} to the skin, hair, eyes, clothing, and tail to give the 2D design a polished, three-dimensional feel. Add a metallic sheen to the buckles and jewelry. Change the background to {argument name="background color" default="solid black"}. Preserve the character's original design, outfit, and neutral pose exactly as they appear in the reference.
translatedPrompt: 使用 REFERENCE_0，将平涂配色的角色转换为 {argument name="art style" default="完整渲染的高质量动漫插画"}。为皮肤、头发、眼睛、服装和尾巴应用精细的 {argument name="lighting effect" default="阴影、光泽高光和深度感"}，赋予 2D 设计精致的立体感。为扣环和珠宝添加金属光泽。将背景更改为 {argument name="background color" default="纯黑色"}。请务必保留角色在参考图中的原始设计、服装和中性姿势。

breakdown.creativeCore: 从平涂配色到动漫渲染着色：将平涂配色的 2D 角色参考图转换为具有纯色背景、经过完整着色与渲染的动漫插画。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
